---
title: "The Rev. John Palmer"
---

## The Rev. John Palmer

**Dates:** (1837-1902)

### Description

missionary to Melanesia

### Biography

See Blain, <i>Biographical Dictionary of Anglican Clergy in the South Pacific</i>, at http://anglicanhistory.org/nz/blain_directory/directory.pdf

### Letters

- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from March 23, 1867.
- Letter from January 29, 1867.
- Letter from [August 1865]
- Letter from Aug. 6, 1863.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
